name: Zerodha Preparation — Fintech, Trading, Small Team Culture

hook.what_you_will_build: Zerodha Preparation — Fintech, Trading, Small Team Culture

key_takeaways: Zerodha tech stack: Go, Python, Java, Kafka, Redis, PostgreSQL
zerodha.tech blog: read 5 recent posts, understand their engineering culture
Trading problems: order book (PQ), P&L calculation (event sourcing), real-time prices (WebSocket+Kafka)
Culture: small team, high ownership, no VC pressure, long-term thinking
Fintech regulatory context: SEBI, NSE/BSE integration, circuit breakers in trading
Round structure: 2-3 coding rounds + system design. Culture fit matters more than at pure tech companies.
